summary: Completed e2e testing of trial_days, Stripe checkout, CRM connections, drag-drop feature ordering, and 'Tiendas Online' text change. All critical features are working correctly.

minor.issue: Some older plans (e.g., Professional) don't have trial_days field in response - not a bug, just legacy data that was created before the feature

issues: Plan cards still show 'Tiendas WC' as label (shorthand) - acceptable but could be changed to 'Tiendas Online' for full consistency

details: trial_days field present in SubscriptionPlanCreate/Update models (backend/routes/admin.py lines 72-113)
trial_days input field exists in AdminPlans.jsx form with data-testid='trial-days-input'
Starter plan configured with 14 days trial
'14 días de prueba' badge visible on Starter plan card in both AdminPlans and Subscriptions pages
Plans with trial_days > 0 show trial badge
User already in trial sees 'Periodo de prueba activo' banner with days remaining
Trial subscription endpoint supports start_trial parameter (backend/routes/subscriptions.py lines 319, 365-383)
Banner shows: 'Periodo de prueba activo - Estás disfrutando de X días restantes de prueba del plan Starter'
Shows trial end date: 'Tu prueba termina el lunes, 23 de marzo de 2026'
Styled with emerald color scheme (border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50)
/api/stripe/create-checkout endpoint functional (backend/routes/stripe.py lines 155-243)
Checkout dialog shows 'Pago seguro con Stripe' and 'Ir a Pagar' button
Amount calculated server-side from plan data (not frontend)
Transaction recorded before redirect to Stripe
max_crm_connections field in SubscriptionPlanCreate/Update models (backend/routes/admin.py lines 79, 100)
Input field exists in AdminPlans.jsx form with data-testid='max-crm-input'
'X conexiones CRM' displayed on plan cards
GripVertical icons (drag handles) visible on feature items
Up/Down arrow buttons for manual reordering
'Arrastra para reordenar las características' instruction text visible
handleDragStart, handleDragOver, handleDrop handlers implemented in AdminPlans.jsx (lines 194-228)
moveFeature function for arrow button ordering (lines 221-228)
Dashboard shows 'Sincronización Tiendas Online' as section header
'Gestionar tiendas online' link visible
Section header does NOT show 'WooCommerce' anymore
Note: Plan cards still use 'Tiendas WC' as shorthand label

critical_code_review_comments: Trial days implementation is complete with backend models, API endpoints, and frontend UI
Stripe checkout uses server-side price calculation (secure) - frontend only passes plan_id
Feature ordering supports both drag-drop and button-based reordering (good UX)
Console warning about setState during render in Login component - not critical but should be investigated

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 passed, 1 minor assertion failure on legacy plan data)

seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_ prefixed plans and cleaned them up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features (trial_days, Stripe checkout, CRM connections, feature ordering, Tiendas Online text) have been verified and are working. User juan@globalds.es is currently in a trial period for the Starter plan with 13 days remaining. Stripe is configured and checkout sessions are created successfully.
screenshots_taken: 06_plan_form.png - Plan creation form with trial_days and CRM fields
